_meta.description: Synthetic X (Twitter) fixture for SETU AAROGYA DRISHTI offline demo & CI. Drawn loosely from the 'Coldrif Adverse Event Watch' scenario; does NOT contain real PII.
_meta.scenario: Coldrif cough-syrup adverse event chatter, Oct 2025

tweets.text: Reports from Madhya Pradesh — children admitted with vomiting & kidney issues after Coldrif cough syrup. Health dept investigating. #Coldrif
tweets.author: @public_health_alert

tweets.text: Coldrif syrup peeke bachhe beemar pad gaye. Diethylene glycol contamination ka shak. Test reports aana baaki.
tweets.author: @hindi_news_watch

tweets.text: AKI cases linked to a paracetamol-based syrup batch. Drug controller asked to recall.
tweets.author: @pharma_observer

tweets.text: Coldrif பேக் ரீகால். குழந்தைகளுக்கு கடுமையான பக்க விளைவுகள். தயவுசெய்து கொடுக்க வேண்டாம்.
tweets.author: @tn_health_voice

tweets.text: Random unrelated tweet about cricket match — should be filtered out by keywords.
tweets.author: @sports_fan
